import { normalizeScreens } from '../util/normalizeScreens' import buildMediaQuery from '../util/buildMediaQuery' export default function ({ tailwindConfig: { theme } }) { return function (css) { css.walkAtRules('screen', (atRule) => { let screen = atRule.params let screens = normalizeScreens(theme.screens) let screenDefinition = screens.find(({ name }) => name === screen) if (!screenDefinition) { throw atRule.error(`No \`${screen}\` screen found.`) } atRule.name = 'media' atRule.params = buildMediaQuery(screenDefinition) }) } }
